intake.user_request: Add docs/CLI.md entries for the 4 CLIs added in dispatch-012 that have no documentation: coderef-analyze, coderef-query, coderef-detect-languages, coderef-semantic-integration. Each entry should match the existing CLI.md format: description, flags, example invocations, exit codes, and any gate contracts.

classification.plan_type_rationale: Single file documentation edit (docs/CLI.md). No source code changes, no public API surface modifications, no blast radius beyond the one markdown file. Light plan: Rule 6 fallthrough.

in_scope: Add coderef-analyze section to docs/CLI.md (12 analysis types, 7 flags, examples, exit codes)
Add coderef-query section to docs/CLI.md (8 query types, 5 flags, examples, exit codes)
Add coderef-detect-languages section to docs/CLI.md (3 flags, examples, exit codes)
Add coderef-semantic-integration section to docs/CLI.md (8 flags, examples, exit codes)
Update Command Overview table with 4 new rows
out_of_scope: Source code changes to any CLI implementation
New CLI tools beyond the 4 specified

constraints: All 4 CLI sections must match existing CLI.md format exactly (description, options table, examples, exit codes)
Flags must be sourced from actual source file parseArgs definitions — no invention
Command Overview table must be updated with correct entries for all 4 CLIs
